name: Pork Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 1-1/2 tbsp soy sauce (try to use low sodium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pork, OJ, soy, 1 tbsp oil, garlic, rosemary and thyme in a shallow nonaluminum dish. Season with black pepper. Turn pork to coat well.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 1 to 6 hours, turning pork occasionally.
3. Remove pork from marinade and wipe dry with a paper towel.
4. Bring marinade to a boil in a small saucepan. Set aside.
5. Heat remaining 1 tbsp oil in a large heavy nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
6. Transfer to a baking dish. Roast at 375 degrees F. for about 20 minutes for medium.
7. Baste twice with marinade during roasting.
8. Let rest 5 minutes before carving.
